loginCreatedMessage: We have now created a login for you and your company. If you do not have the system details, you can always return later.
modelNameHint: Model name is on your registration form
xrgiIdHint: The ID number is 8 digits and located on the side of the machine.
addressHint: Enter the address of this system's location
preFilledFieldsMessage: We have pre-filled some of the fields. You can edit them if the entries do not match your usage.
serviceCostsHint: Your service costs can be found in your contract for the system.
vatDeduction: Select if VAT can be Deducted
addServiceProvider: I want to add my service provider
enterServiceProviderName: Enter the name of the service provider
gasType: What type of gas is supplied to the XRGI system?
annualGasConsumption: What is the annual gas consumption?
consumptionIndependentCosts: Enter the sum of consumption-independent costs
consumptionDependentCosts: Enter the sum of consumption-dependent costs
annualGridConsumption: Enter the annual electricity consumption when purchasing from the grid
fixedCosts: Enter the sum of consumption-independent costs
variableCosts: Enter the sum of consumption-dependent costs
tariffHint: Tariffs, taxes, etc., excl. flexible price
modalTitle: Do you want to save the changes?
modalMessage: Changes have been made to this facility. Do you want to save or discard them?
installationDescription: To start saving money on electricity, new software needs to be installed on your system. This software is developed by EC Power and ensures optimal performance while providing explanations on its benefits. The pricing for this service may vary depending on the plan. See the price overview here.
setupSuperSaverX: Do you want to set up SuperSaverX?
